name: Lewisville Independent School District
districtFact: Lewisville ISD serves a large North Texas suburban area that includes Lewisville, Flower Mound, Highland Village, The Colony, and nearby Denton County communities, where school calendar planning often intersects with DFW commuting, UIL activities, and fast-growing suburban enrollment patterns.

about.title: About Lewisville ISD
about.content: Lewisville Independent School District is a public school district serving students across a fast-growing North Texas area that includes Lewisville, Flower Mound, Highland Village, The Colony, and nearby Denton County communities in the Dallas-Fort Worth metroplex. LISD publishes academic calendars with first and last day dates, staff days, student holidays, student and staff early release dates, district holidays, bad weather days, semester counts, nine-week grading periods, and school hour notes. Families often use the calendar to coordinate DFW commute schedules, UIL activities, childcare, and school-year travel.

about.title: How to Use This Lewisville ISD Calendar
about.content: This page summarizes the official LISD academic calendar PDFs in a searchable format. Families should still confirm campus-specific open houses, testing windows, athletics, graduation ceremonies, and emergency schedule changes through LISD and their assigned school.

planningTips.title: Planning Tips for LISD Families
content: Track staff days separately because they are no-school days for students and often sit next to long weekends.
Add early release dates to family calendars because LISD publishes separate early release times for elementary, middle, and high school.
Watch bad weather days before booking travel around late March or early April.
Check the official LISD calendar page for updates before relying on a downloaded PDF.
Families planning childcare, vacations, and school-year work schedules can use the district dates as the main planning reference, then confirm campus-specific events with their assigned school.

customSections.label: Official Lewisville ISD Calendar Source
customSections.content: This page is based on the Lewisville ISD calendar page and the official 2026-2027 academic calendar PDF linked by the district. The district PDF is the authoritative source, while MySchoolDates reorganizes key dates into searchable sections, calendar downloads, FAQ answers, and parent-friendly summaries. LISD remains the official source for late revisions, campus announcements, and emergency schedule changes.

groups.label: What we verify
items: First student day, last student day, student holidays, early release dates, bad weather day, and grading-period dates are checked against the official LISD source.
Staff days and student/staff early release labels are preserved when they appear in the published LISD academic calendar.
Campus-specific open houses, testing windows, athletics, graduation ceremonies, and emergency closure updates should still be confirmed with LISD and the assigned school.

customSections.label: Lewisville ISD Calendar Highlights for 2026-2027
customSections.content: The dates Lewisville-area families most often need to plan around are the August 12 first day, the March 15-19 Spring Break, the March 29 bad weather day, and the May 21 student early release and last day. These dates matter because they affect afternoon childcare, DFW commute timing, youth sports, after-school activities, family travel, and shared activities across Lewisville, Flower Mound, Highland Village, The Colony, and surrounding communities.

groups.label: Dates that need extra attention
items: May 21, 2027 is both the last student day and a student early release date, so families should check campus dismissal times before planning afternoon care.
December 18, 2026 is listed as a student and staff early release day at the end of the second nine weeks.
March 29, 2027 is marked as the LISD bad weather day; verify whether it remains available before booking non-refundable travel around late March.

groups.label: Why these dates matter
items: Early release dates may require afternoon childcare or adjusted pickup plans.
Winter Break and Spring Break are the main travel windows for families trying to avoid missed class time.
Bad weather days and emergency schedule changes can affect transportation, after-school care, and shared custody schedules.

groups.label: North Texas calendar context
items: LISD families often compare breaks with nearby DFW districts such as Frisco ISD, Plano ISD, Dallas ISD, and Garland ISD.
Because LISD spans multiple suburban communities, campus events and activity calendars may vary even when the district academic calendar is shared.
Families should use this district calendar for student attendance planning and use campus calendars for fine-grained events such as testing, athletics, performances, and graduation.

customSections.label: Planning Around the Lewisville ISD Calendar
customSections.content: Families in the LISD area often use the district calendar for more than school attendance. The first day sets the back-to-school planning window, long breaks shape vacation and childcare decisions, and early release dates can affect work schedules, after-school activities, and transportation. Use the LISD calendar as the district-wide planning base, then confirm campus events with your school.

groups.label: Common planning uses
items: Vacation planning around Thanksgiving Break, Winter Break, and Spring Break.
Childcare planning for staff days, student holidays, and early release afternoons.
Extracurricular planning for UIL activities, youth sports, performances, and campus events.
Transportation planning when dismissal times change or weather days may affect schedules.

customSections.label: Important LISD Dates Parents Should Remember
customSections.content: These are the LISD dates most likely to affect family calendars during the 2026-2027 school year.

groups.label: Parent reminder list
items: First day of school: August 12, 2026.
Winter Break: December 21, 2026 through January 1, 2027.
Spring Break: March 15-19, 2027.
Bad weather day: March 29, 2027, subject to district use if needed.
Last student day and student early release: May 21, 2027.

customSections.label: Lewisville ISD Communities Served
customSections.content: Lewisville ISD families use the same district academic calendar across several North Texas communities. City and campus event calendars can still vary, but the district student attendance calendar applies broadly across the LISD service area. Families searching from local ZIP codes should still verify school assignment and campus events with LISD.

customSections.label: Lewisville ISD Calendar Research & Verification
customSections.content: MySchoolDates reviews Lewisville ISD calendar data from official district sources before publishing the searchable calendar, FAQ answers, and calendar import file. The review process checks key student attendance dates against the LISD PDF and keeps the downloaded .ics file aligned with the reviewed records at the time it is generated.

groups.label: Verification process
items: Official LISD calendar source checked.
First day, last day, major breaks, early release dates, and bad weather day compared against source records.
Calendar import file generated from reviewed Lewisville ISD date records.

compareIntro: Compare the Lewisville ISD school calendar with other Texas district calendars currently available on MySchoolDates. Dates shown include the first day, last day, and spring break.

districtFaqs.q: Which Lewisville ISD calendar does this page summarize?
districtFaqs.a: This page summarizes the official Lewisville ISD academic calendar PDFs, including first day, last day, holidays, staff days, early release dates, bad weather days, nine-week grading periods, and semester counts.

districtFaqs.q: Does Lewisville ISD list bad weather days?
districtFaqs.a: Yes. LISD marks bad weather days on its academic calendar. Families should verify whether those dates remain no-school days after any winter weather closures.

districtFaqs.q: Does Lewisville ISD have early release days?
districtFaqs.a: Yes. The official calendar lists student early release and student and staff early release dates. The PDF also provides campus-level early release times.

districtFaqs.q: Where should families verify last-minute LISD calendar changes?
districtFaqs.a: Use the official Lewisville ISD calendar page and campus announcements for final confirmation. MySchoolDates is an independent reference and is not affiliated with LISD.
